info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: nopaDoyam DAtuH   - ' nakArajAvanusvA nusvArapaYcamO Jali DAtuzu ' iti aBiyuktavacanAt  ' ASaMse syAdicCAyAM SaMsatIti stutO Bavet  hiMsAyAM Sasati ' ( Slo. 183 4 ) iti devaH  ' ayaM hiMsAyAmapi ' iti durgaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra te mahe vidaDe SaMsizam' (aTarva॰20.30.1) praSaMsizam=prASaMsizam prAstAvizamityarTaH
'tristarhi nividA sUktaM viSaMset' (E0 brA0 319) viSabdo nAnAtvamAcazwe viSaMset uccArayet
'mA cidanyad viSasata' (f0 811) viSaMsata stuta
'agnihotriRi devatA aSaMsante' (mE0 saM0) ASaMsante kAmapUrtaye tatra lambante
'tvayyASaMsantyamarAmAnavASca' (BA0 anu0 7256) ukto'rTaH
'tasmAdabalIyAn balIyAMsamASaMsate DarmeRa' (Sa0 brA0 144226) balIyastvamicCatItyarTaH
'ASaMsanto'smAkamanusmarantaH' (BA0 u0 3010) ASaMsanta ASIrBirvarDayantaH ASizA''SAsAnAH
'svakAryasidDiM punarASaSaMsa' (ku0 357) svakAryasidDO BUyopyASAvAnaBUt
'ASaMsatA bARagatiM vfzANke' (ku0 31??) ASaMsatA kaTayatA
'ityASaSaMse karaRErabAhyEH' (raGu0 1450) ASaMsA''SIH
'na nUnaM mayi kEkeyi kiMcidASaMsase guRAn' (rA0 21924) ASaMsase saMBAvayasi jAnAsi
'A tU na indra SaMsaya gozvaSvezu' (f0 1291) ASaMsaya samantAtpraSastAn kurviti sAyaRaH
'sa duzwaH pApamASaMsuH pARqavAnAM mahAtmanAm' (BA0 SAM0 3925) pApamanizwamASaMsuricCuH
'jagmurASaMsavo janAH' (rA0 21635) ASaMsava ASaMsitAraH prArTayitAraH
'sadA yogamASaMsu rmanasA madanAturA' (brahmavE0 12326) ASaMsuH=icCuH
'tadAhuH kasmAtstutamanuSasyate kasmAtstomamatiSaMsanti' (SAM0 brA0 2810) stomAtpareRa kimiti SastramudIryata iti pfcCanti
'anindriyo vA ezo'padevo Bavati yamaBiSaMsanti' (jE0 brA0 196) aBiSaMsanti dozeRABiyujya kaTayanti
'yamajaGnivAMsamaBiSaMseyuH' (tE0 saM0 211010) miTyA pApasaMyojanamaBiSaMsanamiti BawwaBAskaraH
'anenasamenasA so'BiSastAt' (E0 brA0 530) aBiSastAt aBiSaMset apavadet
'mahApApopapApAByAM yo'BiSaMsenmfzA param' (yAjYa0 3285) aBiyuktaM kaTayadityarTaH
'patanIyena karmaRA kftenABiSasyamAnasya' (satyA0 SrO0 22219) dUzyamARasya aByAKyAyamAnasya

'kiM nAma kfpaRaM dEvamaSaktamaBiSaMsasi' (rA0 2237) aBiSaMsasi praSaMsasi atyantaM viralo'trArTe'nyatra prayogaH prakfte cAyamevArTaH saNgacCate kaSca dEvena sOmitre yodDamutsahate pumAn iti dEvapraBAvaM stuvantaM rAmaM prati lakzmaRasyoktiriyam

'yAni miTyABiSastAnAM patantyaSrURi rAGava' (rA0 210059) miTyAdUzitAnAm dozeRABiyujya KyAto'BiSasto Bavati iha DAtuH stutyarTaM vihAya kaTanamAtramarTAntaraM saNkrAntaH so'yaM saNkramo'nyatrApi bahulaM lakzyate
'steno'BiSasto brAhmaRo rAjanyo vESyo vA parasmi~lloke'parimite niraye vftte jAyate' (Apa0 Da0 (226) stenoBiSastaH stenaH sanyastaTA'nAKyAtaH atrABirnaYarTe anyatra durlaBo'rTaH
'AturAmaBiSastAM vA cOravyAGrAdiBirBayEH' (gAm) (manu0 11112) aBiSastAmAkrAntAmiti kullUkaH kaTamasyArTasya labDiriti na jAnImaH

'duHSAsanastUpahato'BiSasto nAvartate manyuvaSAt kftaGnaH' (BA0 u0 3618) aBitaH SastrE rdIrRa iti nIlakaRWaH vyaktamasO Sasu hiMsAyAm iti DAtornizWAyAM rUpaM paSyati DfzwArTAdanyatra nizWAyAmiw syAdeveti na paSyati arTAsaNgatiM cApi na paSyati uttamAdilakzaRAKyAnaprasaNge duHSAsano'Dama iti vivakzannidamAha--duHSAsana iti tatra SastrAlIQaH sa uta neti vaDo'navakASam tena dUzita iti prasiDyannarTa eva grAhyaH
'aBiSastA ivABUvan DyAnamUkatvamAsTitAH' (BA0 droRa0 335)
'vedADyAyaM hatvA savanagataM cABiSastaH' (satyA0 SrO0 26655) aBiSasta iti brahmaGno'BiDAnamiti wIkA
'titikzante aBiSastiM janAnAm' (f0 3301) aBiSastiM garhAM nindAm
'naBo na rUpaM jarimA minAti purA tasyA aBiSasteraDIhi' (f0 17110)
'aBiSastipA Buvanasya rAjA' (f0 99610) aBiSastiraByAKyAnaM dozAropaH
'BUmirmAtAditirno janitraM BrAtAntarikzamaBiSastyA naH' (aTarva0 6122) aBiSastyA'BiSaMsanena miTyApavAdajanitAt pApAditi sAyaRaH
'iti devI mahezvAsaM parigfhyABiSasya ca' (rA0 21116) aBiSasya praSaMsya
'brAhmaRamanftenABiSaMsya' (va0 Da0 2339) aBiyujyetyarTaH
'anaBiSastenyamaYjasA satyamupagezam' (vA0 saM0 55) aBipUrvaH SaMsatirgarhArTe vartata ityuvawaH
'anaBiSastenyamagarhyam paYcASad brAhmaRo daRqyaH kzatriyasyABiSaMsane' (manu0 8268) aBiSaMsane AkroSe
'svaBAvAtkrUrakarmARaScAnyonyABiSaMsinaH' (BA0 vana0 19056) anyonyasya dUzakA ityarTaH
'miTyABiSaMsino dozaH' (yAjYa0 3284) brahmahatyAdikamanena kftamiti miTyA SaMsati kaTayati dudUzayizayA tasya
'kaTaM nu BagavaH SastaM kaTamapratiSastamiti' (Sa0 115510) apratiSastam apratizidDam

prayoga.literature_text: saMnyAsaM karmaRAM kfzRa punaryogaM ca SaMsasi
ekastvaM vijane Gore vane carasi SaMsa naH
sarvaM me SaMsa BagavankaTaM tezAM mayA raRe
sarvaM me SaMsa Bagavan kasyASramapadaM tu
kaTamUrU kaTaM bAhU lakzmaRasya ca SaMsa me
